description: Benchmark-local raw inputs used to rebuild the canonical open-data EHRFlowBench benchmark.

sources.name: TJH COVID-19 time-series cohort
sources.notes: Used as the open tabular data source for reproducible task rewrites.

sources.name: MIMIC-IV Clinical Database Demo in MEDS
sources.access: Open PhysioNet demo snapshot. The benchmark intentionally uses this public demo export instead of the credentialed full MIMIC-IV dataset.
sources.notes: The local copy can be refreshed with python data/ehrflowbench/scripts/fetch_mimic_demo_meds.py.

sources.name: Paper task extraction corpus
sources.notes: prepare_raw.py always refreshes selected_ids.txt and extracted_tasks/ from the vendored upstream curation tree. The committed paper_titles.csv remains canonical and is only regenerated when the optional local markdown mirror is available.
